Forecast.PluginDescription: Predicts future visitor numbers per site using the Prophet time-series library.
Forecast.SettingPythonBinPathDescription: Set the path to the python executable.
Forecast.SettingApiKeyDescription: API key from menotec. Contact info@menotec.de for an API key.
Forecast.SettingApiHostnameDescription: Enter the menotec hostname (e.g. http://forecast.localhost). Contact info@menotec.de for the hostname.
